manga_subject: A young Indian man with sharp, determined features and short messy black hair. He has a small scar on his left cheek and warm South Asian skin tones.

panels.art_style: Masashi Kishimoto style: clean fine-line work, specific eye shapes, tactical shading
panels.outfit: Konoha flak jacket over a black mesh shirt with a forehead protector
panels.environment: Training ground with wooden posts and lush green trees

panels.art_style: Eiichiro Oda style: bold varied line weights, exaggerated expressions, vibrant patterns
panels.outfit: Open tropical shirt with a captain's coat draped over shoulders
panels.environment: Sunny deck of a pirate ship with the Jolly Roger flying

panels.art_style: Akira Toriyama style: sharp angular muscle definition, iconic spiky hair highlights
panels.outfit: Weighted training gi with wristbands and martial arts boots
panels.environment: Cyan grass and green skies with multiple moons

panels.art_style: Tite Kubo style: high-contrast black and white, sharp clothing folds, intense gazes
panels.outfit: Shinigami black kimono (shihakusho) with a zanpakuto at the waist
panels.environment: Traditional Japanese architecture with white stone walls

panels.art_style: Hirohiko Araki style: heavy cross-hatching, dramatic fashion posing, neon color theory
panels.outfit: High-fashion designer suit with heart-shaped cutouts and gold chains
panels.environment: Baroque Italian street with dramatic speed lines

panels.art_style: Hayao Miyazaki style: soft painterly textures, watercolor backgrounds, gentle features

panels.art_style: Katsuhiro Otomo style: hyper-detailed urban decay, mechanical realism, cinematic lighting
panels.outfit: Red leather biker jacket and tech-wear trousers
panels.environment: Cyberpunk city street with glowing neon signs and cracked concrete

panels.art_style: Koyoharu Gotouge style: Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic, flowy line art, elemental effects
panels.outfit: Checkered haori over a demon slayer uniform with a Nichirin sword
panels.environment: Snowy pine forest at night with wisteria hanging

panels.art_style: Hajime Isayama style: gritty textures, thick outlines, intense emotional line work
panels.outfit: Survey Corps scout regiment jacket with the Wings of Freedom emblem
panels.environment: Top of a massive stonewall looking over a vast green valley
